title: Singapore demographics: 65.5% female, older workforce, higher education
summary: Singapore shows a distinct demographic profile vs the region. Gender: 65.52% female vs 39.84% regional. Age: 25-30 bracket 43.1% (vs 57% regional), 31-35 at 29.3% (vs 13.8%), and 36-45 at 20.7% combined (vs 6.0%). Education: 71.8% Bachelor's, 13.8% Master's (vs 5.2% regional), 77.6% design-related education. Overseas working experience at 27.0% (vs 14.2% regional).
methodology: Self-reported demographics in anonymous online survey, filtered to Singapore-based respondents
